_doc_: Stage 21 chain-history example — produces the same accounts + cascade as
the hardcoded all-at-once seed, but staggered across three blocks. Every
validator must load the same file (determinism contract, see
Block 1: deposits for all 5 accounts + Dave/Eve place resting Sell orders
at 110. No fills yet — the book has asks but no bids cross them.
Block 2: Alice/Bob/Carol each market-buy against Dave's/Eve's resting asks.
Four fills land; Alice/Bob/Carol are long, Dave/Eve are short.
At the end of tick 2 the oracle has been publishing 102, so Bob
(collateral 90, position long 10 @ 110) is Liquidatable and Carol
cascade fires for the first time.
Block 3: Mark-book orders (Buy 95, Sell 97 → midpoint 96). With both the
oracle (102) and the CLOB midpoint (96) available, effective_mark
is still the oracle. Position state already cleared by tick 2's
cascade, so block 3's tick is a no-op except for funding.
